sections.label: We believe Antler is the best place on the planet for people to launch category-defining companies.‍‍We’re not here to chase trends — we’re here to support founders to dedicate the
sections.text: We believe Antler is the best place on the planet for people to launch category-defining companies.‍‍We’re not here to chase trends — we’re here to support founders to dedicate themselves to the most meaningful work of their lives.

sections.label: Antler is the best place on the planet to grow your company
sections.text: Antler is the best place on the planet to grow your companyWith a presence in major technology ecosystems across the world we back the most driven entrepreneurs and give them the platform, capital, and community needed to create lasting impact.1,800portfolio companies12,000+founders supported24locations worldwide @container (max-width: 55.2rem) { .large_globe_wrap { display: none; } .globe_section_left { height: auto !important; } }

sections.label: FEATURED ANTLER —INSIGHTS
sections.text: FEATURED ANTLER —INSIGHTSInsightsThe Anatomy of Greatness: What Makes a Unicorn Founder?Antler’s report provides new insights on speed, geography, experience, and the changing profile of founders behind the world’s most valuable startups.‍Peter Sarlin on Building the Future: AI, Innovation, and Quantum Computing in Europe | The Further, Faster PodcastPeter Sarlin, co-founder and CEO of Silo AI, is a passionate advocate for European startups. He joins Antler founder and CEO Marcus Grimeland to discuss what the future might look like for the continent’s tech ecosystem ‍PodcastHow we built AntlerAntler Founder and CEO Magnus Grimeland on the origins of Antler, the rise of global entrepreneurship, and the mission to back outliers everywhere from inception. PodcastEurope's Execution Era: An Antler StudyAntler's latest report is one of the largest studies of tech founders in Europe. We’ve analysed more than 3,000 unicorn founders and 60,000 founders at the inception of their journey, uncovering Europe's rapid growth in an AI era of execution.‍Insights .hover_thumbnail { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; } @container (width < 70rem) { .featured-insights_layout

sections.label: Antler was our first investor—an incubator of optimists. Joining Antler wasn’t just about funding; it was about surrounding ourselves with people who see potential, take risks, and
sections.text: Antler was our first investor—an incubator of optimists. Joining Antler wasn’t just about funding; it was about surrounding ourselves with people who see potential, take risks, and build. For anyone wondering if they should take the leap with Antler, my answer is an optimistic YES. There’s a big chance it could change your life, and I would do it all over again if I could.Antler has been a great partner and Lovable is excited to support their mission to enable more people to build businesses that progress the world.Antler was instrumental in turning Capsa AI from an idea into reality. Their backing gave us the confidence, network, and capital to move fast—helping us refine our GTM, secure funding, and scale with private equity firms. For any founder looking to take the leap, Antler provides the right mix of support and challenge to make it happen.

sections.label: We believe Antler is the best place on the planet for people to launch category-defining companies.‍‍We’re not here to chase trends — we’re here to support founders to dedicate the
sections.text: We believe Antler is the best place on the planet for people to launch category-defining companies.‍‍We’re not here to chase trends — we’re here to support founders to dedicate themselves to the most meaningful work of their lives.

sections.label: Antler is the best place on the planet to grow your company
sections.text: Antler is the best place on the planet to grow your companyWith a presence in major technology ecosystems across the world we back the most driven entrepreneurs and give them the platform, capital, and community needed to create lasting impact.1,800portfolio companies12,000+founders supported24locations worldwide @container (max-width: 55.2rem) { .large_globe_wrap { display: none; } .globe_section_left { height: auto !important; } }

sections.label: FEATURED ANTLER —INSIGHTS
sections.text: FEATURED ANTLER —INSIGHTSInsightsThe Anatomy of Greatness: What Makes a Unicorn Founder?Antler’s report provides new insights on speed, geography, experience, and the changing profile of founders behind the world’s most valuable startups.‍Peter Sarlin on Building the Future: AI, Innovation, and Quantum Computing in Europe | The Further, Faster PodcastPeter Sarlin, co-founder and CEO of Silo AI, is a passionate advocate for European startups. He joins Antler founder and CEO Marcus Grimeland to discuss what the future might look like for the continent’s tech ecosystem ‍PodcastHow we built AntlerAntler Founder and CEO Magnus Grimeland on the origins of Antler, the rise of global entrepreneurship, and the mission to back outliers everywhere from inception. PodcastEurope's Execution Era: An Antler StudyAntler's latest report is one of the largest studies of tech founders in Europe. We’ve analysed more than 3,000 unicorn founders and 60,000 founders at the inception of their journey, uncovering Europe's rapid growth in an AI era of execution.‍Insights .hover_thumbnail { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; } @container (width < 70rem) { .featured-insights_layout

sections.label: Antler was our first investor—an incubator of optimists. Joining Antler wasn’t just about funding; it was about surrounding ourselves with people who see potential, take risks, and
sections.text: Antler was our first investor—an incubator of optimists. Joining Antler wasn’t just about funding; it was about surrounding ourselves with people who see potential, take risks, and build. For anyone wondering if they should take the leap with Antler, my answer is an optimistic YES. There’s a big chance it could change your life, and I would do it all over again if I could.Antler has been a great partner and Lovable is excited to support their mission to enable more people to build businesses that progress the world.Antler was instrumental in turning Capsa AI from an idea into reality. Their backing gave us the confidence, network, and capital to move fast—helping us refine our GTM, secure funding, and scale with private equity firms. For any founder looking to take the leap, Antler provides the right mix of support and challenge to make it happen.

For any founder looking to take the leap, Antler provides the right mix of support and challenge to make it happen.
